trivialization_signals_checked: Does the analog reduce avyayām to 'always remembered'? No — preserved as imperishable, with the structural meaning intact and the 2.17 / 2.21 mirror surfaced.
Does the analog flatten 'maraṇād atiricyate' to a slogan? No — rendered structurally, not as 'death before dishonour' bumper-sticker.
Does the analog drop the sambhāvitasya restriction? No — preserved.
Does the analog reduce the verse to personal-branding? Explicitly no — falsifiability rules this out.
verdict_reason: Doctrinal weight preserved. Engineering layer is additive. PASS.
